case_title: GEORGE, DIANA VS CATHCART, RYAN MICHAEL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEORGE, DIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATHCART, RYAN MICHAEL $210.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $232.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-10-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-14-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $610.00 FILED BY GEORGE, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT CATHCART, RYAN MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEORGE, DIANA HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEORGE, DIANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CATHCART, RYAN MICHAEL DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-15-2003, GRANTED
